summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DREAMOVEN Inventory Management System - all new features (Purchase Orders with status filters, Current Stock with Today GRN, Reports integration, Admin delete PO) working correctly. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
passed_tests: API health endpoint returns healthy status
Admin login with correct credentials (parveenkatyal2312@gmail.com / admin@123)
Invalid login correctly rejected with 401
GET /purchase-orders returns list of POs
GET /purchase-orders/stats/summary returns status counts (pending, partial, received, cancelled, total)
GET /purchase-orders?status=pending filters correctly
GET /purchase-orders?status=received filters correctly
GET /purchase-orders/{id} returns PO details with GRN info
DELETE /purchase-orders/{id} fails for received POs (400 error)
GET /current-stock returns items with all required fields (item_name, category, current_stock, today_grn, total, par_stock, status)
GET /current-stock/stats returns summary (total_items, today_grn_items, below_par, stock_ok)
POST /current-stock/update allows admin to edit stock values
GET /reports/vendor-ledger returns PO and GRN data by vendor
GET /reports/kitchen-ledger returns requisition and issue data
GET /reports/stock-in-hand returns stock value report
GET /reports/consumption-analysis returns consumption data
GET /grns returns list of GRNs with PO references
GET /dashboard/stats returns all required stats
GET /alerts returns stock alerts
UI: Login flow works correctly
UI: Purchase Orders page shows status filter tabs (Pending, Partial, Received, All) with counts
UI: Purchase Orders page shows summary cards (Pending, Partial, Received, Cancelled)
UI: Purchase Orders View button opens PO details modal with GRN verification section
UI: Admin can delete pending PO (delete button appears only for non-received POs)
UI: Admin cannot delete received PO (no delete button shown)
UI: Current Stock page shows summary cards (Total Items, Today's GRN Items, Below Par Stock, Stock OK)
UI: Current Stock page shows filter tabs (All, Below Par, Stock OK) with counts
UI: Current Stock table has all required columns (ITEM, CATEGORY, CURRENT, TODAY GRN, TOTAL, PAR STOCK, STATUS)
UI: Admin can edit current stock and par stock values (editable inputs present)
UI: Reports page shows all report tabs (Vendor Ledger, Kitchen Ledger, Daywise Reports, Stock in Hand, Consumption Analysis)
UI: Vendor Ledger shows PO and GRN data with summary stats
UI: GRN page shows existing GRNs with PO references
UI: Logout functionality works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test PO (PO-20260321-0002) to verify delete functionality - was successfully deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from Kinfolk Store have been implemented and tested: 1) Purchase Orders with Pending/Partial/Received/All filter tabs and status counts, 2) GRN integration showing received quantities, 3) Reports tab with Vendor Ledger showing PO and GRN data, 4) Admin can edit current stock and par stock values, 5) Current Stock shows Item/Category/Current/Today GRN/Total/Par Stock/Status columns, 6) Admin can delete PO before GRN (delete button only appears for non-received POs). Test data: 1 received PO (PO-20260321-0001) with GRN exists in database.

purchase_orders.status_filter_tabs: Pending, Partial, Received, All - all working with counts
purchase_orders.summary_cards: Pending, Partial, Received, Cancelled - all showing correct counts
purchase_orders.view_button: Opens modal with PO details, items table, and GRN verification section
purchase_orders.delete_functionality: Admin can delete pending POs, cannot delete received POs

current_stock.summary_cards: Total Items, Today's GRN Items, Below Par Stock, Stock OK - all working
current_stock.filter_tabs: All, Below Par, Stock OK - all working with counts
current_stock.table_columns: ITEM, CATEGORY, CURRENT, TODAY GRN, TOTAL, PAR STOCK, STATUS - all present
current_stock.edit_functionality: Admin can edit current stock and par stock values via inline inputs

reports.tabs: Vendor Ledger, Kitchen Ledger, Daywise Reports, Stock in Hand, Consumption Analysis
reports.vendor_ledger: Shows PO count, PO value, GRN count, GRN value per vendor

grn.integration: GRN creation updates stock and links to PO
grn.today_grn: Today's GRN quantities shown in Current Stock page
